roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: MATTER ADDED TO CALENDAR TO RE-SENTENCE DEFENDANT/CTORD: SENTENCE OFAUGUST 21, 2019 IN DEPARTMENT 25 VACATED,/DEF: RESENTENCE AS FOLLOWS:/CTORD: RESTITUTION OT THE VICITM IN THE AMOUNT OF $18,627,04/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO PAY RESTITUTION TO THE NAMES VICTIM: TRIPLE AUGHT DESIGN LLC/X: CR-110 AND CR-111 SIGNED AND FILED/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER IN 19006658, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO, 19007036, 19006480, 19003154 AND 19003195,/CAL:SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(H)(5)(B), A SPLIT SENTENCE/AJW/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 1TO 4 YEARS/STATES/X:TOTAL 4 YEARS/X:PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)(5)(B), THE SENTENCE IS TO BE SERVED AS FOLLOWS:/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 399 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,399 SAGE PLUS MILESTONE CREDITS OF 7 DAYS FOR A TOTAL OF 805 DAYS,/CH1:CJ805D /CTS: 805/MANSUPCTS:805/MANSUP: 655 DAYS/MANSUP1/DEF: IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR 4019 CREDITS/CCC: COUNTS AND CASES19007036, 19006480, 19003154 & 19003195/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF MANDATORY SUPERVISION DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO BE FITTED WITH A ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE FORA PERIOD OF 6 MONTHS,/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO MAINTAINTHE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH A CURFEWFOR A PERIOD OF 6:00PM TO6:00AM/WS/WEAP/CTORD: DEFENDANT NOT TO POSSES BURGLARY TOOLS/IND/X:THE DEFENDANT HAVING ENTERED A HARVEY WAIVER IN COURT NO,19006658 AND DISMISSED COUNT(S) IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:/X:PAY RESTITUTIONIN THE AMOUNT OF $18,627,04 TO /X:CR-110 & CR-111 ARE SIGNED AND FILED INCOURT,/COA:40/ICNA/VF4:300/SUSFF/COLLECT/4019HALF/CTORD: DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO ADULT PROBAION DEPARTMENT TO BE FITTED WITH AN ELECTRONIC MONITORINGDEVICE,/MSUP TERM: 01-27-22/
